# ZIPCodeDetails

> Free reference site for all 39,398 US ZIP codes. Data sourced from US Census Bureau
> and USPS public datasets. For each ZIP, we provide city, county, state, time zone,
> coordinates, demographics (population, median income, median home value, housing units),
> and nearby ZIP codes with distances.

## What this site covers
- 39,398 ZIP codes (STANDARD + PO BOX)
- 29,747 cities
- 3,239 counties
- 59 states and US territories

## Key page types
- /zip/[code] — full detail page for a single ZIP code
- /city/[slug] — all ZIP codes in a given city
- /county/[slug] — all ZIP codes in a given county
- /state/[code] — all ZIP codes in a given state

## Sitemap
[Full sitemap](https://zipcodedetails.netlify.app/sitemap-index.xml)

## Data sources
- US Census Bureau Gazetteer: https://www.census.gov/geographies/reference-files/time-series/geo/gazetteer-files.html
- USPS Postal Data (federal public records)

## Limitations
- This is unofficial reference data; for official address validation use USPS.com
- ZIP boundaries are based on ZCTAs which approximate USPS routes but don't match exactly
- UNIQUE-type ZIPs (e.g., government agencies, large corporations) and MILITARY ZIPs are not
  included as they have negligible search demand
